case_title: SILICON WORLD TRADE CORP. DBA AMERICAN SKYNET VS IN TOUCH GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $807.65 FILED BY SILICON WORLD TRADE CORP. DBA AMERICAN SKYNET AS TO DEFENDANT IN TOUCH GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IN TOUCH GROUP INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILICON WORLD TRADE CORP. DBA AMERICAN SKYNET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IN TOUCH GROUP INC. $807.65 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $853.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT IN TOUCH GROUP INC.
